description: 15 build prompts for Vai. Each project names a reference repo as the quality bar (style, fit/finish, technique) — Vai is NOT asked to copy, just to meet that bar. Rubrics are deterministic so the harness still scores without a judge model.

projects.prompt: Build a single-file static landing page hero using only HTML + CSS (no framework). Bold gradient headline, animated floating shapes (CSS keyframes only), responsive at 375/768/1280, CLS < 0.1, no external runtime JS. Output a complete index.html with <style> embedded.
projects.qualityBar: Award-winning CSS-only motion. Fluid, no jank, accessible.

projects.prompt: Build a tiny T3-style todo app: Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind, single page, in-memory store (no backend), keyboard-accessible add/toggle/delete, dark mode by system pref. Provide package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, index.html, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/index.css.
projects.qualityBar: T3 strictness: typed everything, lint-clean, sensible defaults.

turns.prompt: Now add a 'Clear completed' button below the list that removes all completed todos. Keep it accessible (visible focus, aria-label) and keep types clean.

projects.prompt: Build a Vite + React + Tailwind page that renders a responsive 1/2/3-col card grid of 6 cards with shadcn-style design language (rounded-xl, soft shadows, subtle borders, hover lift). Each card has icon, title, description, action button. Provide package.json, vite.config.ts, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/index.css, index.html.
projects.qualityBar: Shadcn fit and finish: tasteful spacing, restrained color, real interaction states.

projects.prompt: Build a Vite + React + Tailwind + Framer Motion page that staggers a list of 8 feature items in on first paint, with hover scale and tap feedback. Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Provide package.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/index.css, index.html.
projects.qualityBar: Subtle, tasteful motion. No bouncy distractions.

projects.prompt: Build a single-page utility (color palette generator). Vite + React + TS + Tailwind. Click buttons to generate 5 OKLCH swatches, each click animated via CSS transitions, copy-to-clipboard on click of any swatch hex. No external API. Provide package.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/index.css, index.html.

Build a Vite + React + TypeScript counter+form demo that teaches React fundamentals: controlled input, derived state, useEffect cleanup, error boundary. Comment each fundamental briefly inline. Provide package.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/ErrorBoundary.tsx, index.html.
projects.qualityBar: Textbook clarity. Self-explanatory code, idiomatic React.

projects.prompt: Build a single-file pricing page (3 tiers) in pure HTML+CSS. No JS. Highlight the recommended tier. Responsive 375/768/1280. WCAG AA contrast. Output a complete index.html with embedded <style>.

turns.prompt: Now add a Compare features section below the tiers as a semantic <table> with at least 5 feature rows and a check/dash per tier. Pure HTML+CSS, still no JS, still single index.html. Re-emit the complete file.

projects.prompt: Build a Vite + React + Tailwind drag-and-drop file dropzone (no upload, just preview file names + sizes locally). Visible focus, keyboard activation, drag-over visual state. Provide package.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/index.css, index.html.
projects.qualityBar: Polished interaction states. Real keyboard support.

projects.prompt: Build a Vite + React + TS + Zod typed contact form with end-to-end inferred types and inline validation messages. No network call — log to console. Provide package.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/schema.ts, src/index.css, index.html.
projects.qualityBar: Type-safe end to end, runtime + compile-time validation aligned.

projects.prompt: Build a minimal Next.js 14 App Router blog with two static posts. Tailwind. SEO meta, OpenGraph, sitemap.xml, robots.txt. Provide package.json, next.config.mjs, app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx, app/posts/[slug]/page.tsx, app/sitemap.ts, app/robots.ts, app/globals.css.
Build a single-file accessible tabbed interface using only CSS (radio-button technique) and ARIA roles. 3 tabs, keyboard navigable, no JS. Output complete index.html.
projects.qualityBar: WCAG AA, keyboard parity with JS tabs.

projects.prompt: Build a Vite + React + Tailwind dashboard page with 4 stat cards (number, label, sparkline drawn as inline SVG), responsive grid, dark mode toggle that persists to localStorage. Provide package.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/index.css, index.html.

turns.prompt: Now add a search input above the cards that filters the visible cards by label (case-insensitive substring match). Keep it accessible with a label or aria-label.

projects.prompt: Build a single-file scroll-reveal page using CSS scroll-driven animations (animation-timeline: view()). 6 sections that fade and translate in as they enter the viewport. Graceful fallback: instant visibility for unsupported browsers. Output complete index.html with embedded <style>.
projects.qualityBar: Modern CSS. No JS, no IntersectionObserver.

projects.prompt: Build a Vite + React + TS + Tailwind command palette overlay (Cmd/Ctrl+K to open, Esc to close, fuzzy filter over a fixed list of 12 commands, arrow-key navigation, Enter to invoke). Trap focus while open. Provide package.json, src/main.tsx, src/App.tsx, src/CommandPalette.tsx, src/index.css, index.html.
projects.qualityBar: Linear-style palette quality: instant, focused, keyboard-first.

projects.prompt: Build a Vite + Three.js page with a single rotating cube, responsive canvas, color shifts on hover, paused when tab not visible. Provide package.json, vite.config.ts, src/main.ts, src/style.css, index.html.
projects.qualityBar: Smooth 60fps, properly dispose on unmount, no leaks.
